articles.title: hit tech companies fear slowdown in spends
articles.description: Iran-Israel war: The Strait of Hormuz, through which a third of the world's seaborne oil passes, was temporarily closed following the escalation, rattling global energy markets and threatening a price rise. With approximately 60% of India's oil imports sourced from the Middle East, higher crude prices could weaken US and European growth, forcing enterprises to cut discretionary technology budgets.

articles.description: Started in 2025 by Sumit Anand and Thakare, Inamo offers full-stack solutions for quick commerce, including inventory management, fulfilment, and technology. At present, it processes 1.8 million orders per month.

articles.description: As tensions grow in the Middle East, attention is turning to which country has the strongest air defence system, with its technology and multi-layered protection in focus.
articles.content: New Delhi: The Middle East is witnessing a full-scale war, with the recent US-Israel strikes on Iran intensifying the situation. The elimination of Iran’s Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei has added to regional instability. Over the past 24 hours... [3765 chars]

articles.title: Gujarat CM Bhupendra Patel unveils science, tech and innovation policy
articles.description: Chief Minister Bhupendra Patel unveiled the Science, Technology and Innovation (STI) Policy 2026–2031 during the inaugural session of the Gujarat SemiConnect Conference in Gandhinagar on Sunday. The policy aims to position Gujarat among the world’s leading innovation-driven economies by harnessing science, technology and innovation as central pillars of inclusive development, industrial competitiveness and societal progress, […]
articles.content: The policy also announces the creation of Gujarat Rajya Research and Innovation Clusters (GRRIC), forming a comprehensive Science and Technology cluster network beginning with the Gandhinagar–Ahmedabad region and expanding to Vadodara–Surat and Rajko... [930 chars]

articles.title: US Futures Show Weakness as S&P 500 E-Minis Fall 0.9%, Nasdaq Futures Drop 1.1%
articles.description: US equity futures declined in pre-market trading, with S&P 500 E-mini futures down 0.9% and Nasdaq futures falling 1.1%. The negative momentum across major indices suggests potential weakness in US stock markets, with technology stocks showing relatively greater pressure than the broader market.
articles.content:
US equity futures showed negative momentum in pre-market trading, with major indices pointing to a weaker opening for American stock markets. The futures movement reflected investor sentiment ahead of the regular trading session.
Futures Performance ... [3042 chars]
